---
title: "Teaching"
---

I teach and coordinate courses in health economics, finance, and behavioural economics at Newcastle Business School.

## Current and recent teaching

- ECON2112 Health Economics and Finance
- ECON3111 Behavioural Economics
- ECON3011 Health Economics & Finance

My teaching links economic theory with applied health policy, empirical evidence, and decision-making in real healthcare systems.
